html: Both sides of each case should really start doing this after any ruling. As we've seen dozens and dozens of times, there is nothing that says the Supreme Court will have the same interpretation of the same less-than-crystal-clear words 10 years from now. Their decisions in the meantime are also not really democratic yet trend consistently towards their (albeit, very well argued versions of) individual political views instead. It's a problem of the current court as much as it was a problem of the court 20, 40, or 60 years ago.
